title: Xtra Dense Croatian Lamb Tagine
description: A dense and bitter one-pot Croatian dish featuring chimichurri sauce and tagine-cooked lamb, suitable for a satvik diet. This recipe combines the flavors of Croatia with the cooking technique of a tagine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb shoulder on all sides, then set it aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot, cooking for 5 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Add the browned lamb shoulder, chimichurri sauce, and prunes to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Serve the tagine over couscous or with crusty bread, if desired.
